name: Chanhassen Rec Center
description: Chanhassen Rec Center is a place to play pickleball in Chanhassen, MN. There are 8 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Chanhassen Roundhouse Park
description: Chanhassen Roundhouse Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Excelsior, MN. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Chaska Community Center
description: Chaska Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chaska, MN. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Chaska Lions Park

description: Diethelm Park is a place to play pickleball in Victoria, MN. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include lights and restrooms.

name: East Creek

name: Holy Family Catholic High School
description: Come play pickleball at Holy Family Catholic High School in Victoria, MN! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Life Time - Chanhassen
description: Life Time - Chanhassen is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chanhassen, MN. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, lights, food, locker rooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Mayer Lutheran High School
